prompt: 请执行一次 Browser Provider Router Stage 1 的真实可见终端验收，最终回答必须包含固定标记：BROWSER_PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_READY。 你必须调用 bash 执行这个命令验证 provider router 协议层：python -c "from learning_agent.browser.providers import BrowserProviderRouter, BrowserProviderHealth, BrowserProviderKind, build_provider_decision_event; r=BrowserProviderRouter(); h={BrowserProviderKind.CHROME_EXTENSION: BrowserProviderHealth.unavailable(BrowserProviderKind.CHROME_EXTENSION,'extension_not_connected'), BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP: BrowserProviderHealth.available(BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP)}; d=r.decide_provider(user_input='当前浏览器 login state', tool_name='browser_snapshot', arguments={}, provider_health=h, allow_cdp_fallback=True); p=build_provider_decision_event(d); assert d.provider==BrowserProviderKind.REAL_CHROME_CDP; assert p['schema_version']==1; assert p['reason_code']=='extension_unavailable_cdp_fallback_allowed'; assert p['metadata']['fallback_from']=='chrome_extension'; print('PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_OK provider='+p['provider']+' reason_code='+p['reason_code']+' schema_version='+str(p['schema_version'])+' fallback_from='+p['metadata']['fallback_from'])" 不要提前最终回答；只有 bash 命令成功输出 PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：BROWSER_PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_READY PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_OK provider=real_chrome_cdp reason_code=extension_unavailable_cdp_fallback_allowed schema_version=1 fallback_from=chrome_extension

stages.name: interactive_turn

stages.checkpoint:
真实可见终端验收已通过。

BROWSER_PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_READY PROVIDER_ROUTER_STAGE1_OK provider=real_chrome_cdp reason_code=extension_unavailable_cdp_fallback_allowed schema_version=1 fallback_from=chrome_extension
